faqs.question: What is included in the Silver plan?
faqs.answer: The Silver plan includes daily upper-body wipe, twice-a-week water wash, and interior disinfection. It is the most affordable option for everyday commuters.

faqs.question: How do I reschedule a service?
faqs.answer: Open the Dashboard, tap the upcoming service in the Weekly Schedule, and pick a new date or time. Changes save immediately and you will receive a confirmation notification.

faqs.question: Can I pause my subscription when I travel?
faqs.answer: Yes. From Profile → Manage Subscription, choose 'Pause' and set a return date. No charges are raised for the paused window.

faqs.question: Which cities is CCube available in?
faqs.answer: We currently operate in Faridabad, Noida, Gurgaon, and Delhi. Offline demo mode shows this hard-coded list; online mode fetches the live serviceable city list.

faqs.question: How do referral rewards work?
faqs.answer: Share your referral code with a friend. When they subscribe to any monthly plan, you both receive a one-time credit on your next invoice.

faqs.question: Is my payment data stored on the app?
faqs.answer: No. Payments are processed by Razorpay. The app only stores the order ID and the payment status for reconciliation.

faqs.question: How do I switch to dark mode?
faqs.answer: Open the side menu and tap the theme toggle. You can choose Light, Dark, or follow your system preference.

faqs.question: What is offline demo mode?
faqs.answer: Offline demo mode lets you explore the entire app without a backend. All screens load with representative mock data. Toggle it via the badge at the bottom-right of the screen.
